Affiliation

Orphosys Education is committed to excellence and quality. We hold official certifications and recognized partnerships that validate our educational standards.

Official Document

ISO CERTIFICATE

Certified Quality Management System ensuring international standards in educational delivery and management.

Government Registered

CERTIFICATE OF INCORPORATION

Legally registered government entity under the Companies Act, providing a secure foundation for our students.

Micro & Small Enterprise

MSME CERTIFICATE

Recognized by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, supporting local growth and innovation.
